title: taraxacum lyngeanum
intro: Taraxacum lyngeanum, also known as Lynge's dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is used as a medicinal herb, valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been traditionally used to support liver and kidney function, as well as to treat digestive issues and skin conditions. Taraxacum lyngeanum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
